success.description: You present a false identity to influence your target, potentially dissuading him from hostility

As above, plus leave this card in play as if it were recharging. When an enemy performs a menoeuvre, you may recharge this card to interrupt him and perform a manoeuvre yourself. The enemy's turn then continues as normal

boon.description: You may immediately perform a manoeuvre for free

bane.description: The GM may add or remove 1 recharge token to one of your cards.

success.description: You present a false identity to influence your target, potentially dissuading him from hostility

As above, plus leave this card in play as if it were recharging. When an enemy performs a menoeuvre, you may recharge this card to interrupt him and perform a manoeuvre yourself. The enemy's turn then continues as normal

boon.description: Add to any check you make during your interrupt action

bane.description: Gain to any check you make during your interrupting action
